work-visa-types-inside-uk.header: Did you apply for a Health and Care Worker visa?
work-visa-types-inside-uk.paragraph: A Health and Care Worker visa allows medical professionals to do an eligible job with the NHS, an NHS supplier or in adult social care.

out-of-scope.header: Family visas and applications to settle in the UK
out-of-scope.intro: You cannot use this tool if you applied for a family visa or application to settle in the UK. This is because processing times vary depending on your personal circumstances.
out-of-scope.paragraph: You can check standard visa processing times to find out how long it usually takes to get a decision on a family or settlement application.

priority-outcome-outside.title: Outcome
priority-outcome-outside.warning-msg: Please check your email, including your spam or junk folder.

accessibility.header: Accessibility statement for Check your visa processing time
